title: Contacts
description: Authoritative list on this device (the Agent can propose adds — you choose normal, trusted, or reject in the popup). Each contact is one address on one chain; updating the same name replaces that row. Duplicate address+chain pairs are rejected. Trusted contacts may auto-sign transfers within your daily and per-transaction limits and token whitelist without prompting each time.
emptyDesc: After completing a transfer with someone, their address will appear here automatically.
emptyHint: You can also add via Agent — just say: "Add contact Alice, Ethereum address 0x1234..."
